data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of 'Last-touch/first-touch policy fields', but there is no evidence provided that confirms their existence. The linked use case explicitly states the need for these fields, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence related to this requirement, indicating a gap in the required functionality. This lack of evidence leads to the conclusion that the requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of last-touch/first-touch policy fields.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the presence of last-touch/first-touch policy fields.
